programmes.show_description: Tense thriller with Randy Couture. After he's sabotaged by those closest to him during a bullet-ridden heist, a brilliant thief manages to survive - and vows to kill everyone who betrayed him (2022).
How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Tense thriller with Randy Couture. After he's sabotaged by those closest to him during a bullet-ridden heist, a brilliant thief manages to survive - and vows to kill everyone who betrayed him (2022).
Mannering finds himself impeded by the tyrannical government of a war-ravaged country's secret police.
The Ministry suspect that Steed has become a double agent when he starts to behave suspiciously. But can he keep his secret safe and save Purdey ?
Contemporary western with Tom Berenger, Luke Perry and Burt Reynolds. Three brothers are pulled into a fiery conflict between old cowboys and new homesteaders. (1/2) (2002).
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.

With Tara on holiday, Steed recruits his aristocratic friend to help him find the assassin responsible for the deaths of multiple agents. The case soon leads them to an unlikely killer.
Tara and Steed investigate when members of the Institute of Timber Technology are killed. Will The Avengers locate the killers before they have the chance to execute their deadly masterplan?
Henry Silva guest-stars as a revolutionary who plans to assassinate Benito Juarez, exiled President of Mexico, on the Cannon ranch.
Explosive western with Trace Adkins and Ron Perlman. For ranch enforcer South, justice is a loaded gun. But he's about to discover a dark secret behind his life of violence and bloodshed... (2014)

After a gang robs the saloon, the leader kills two of his men and flees Tombstone.
Claibourne witnesses Vic Reel kill a newspaperman from Denver; in his efforts to uncover the motive for the murder, Hollister succeeds in the capture of the Taylor gang.
Buck Cannon goes to work as a foreman for a lovely neighbouring widow, and clashes with his brother John when the job appears permanent.
Following coincidental events in a Brighton casino, Danny is mistaken for a Soviet spy and given a mysterious list of names. But British Intelligence is far from happy.
Steed and Tara investigate when national security is compromised by a foreign agent who has devised ingenious methods of extracting top secret information out of British agents.
Knocked out in pursuit of a rogue agent, Steed awakes to the sight of a deserted London under the control of an embittered Brigadier with explosive plans.
